{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Akura tower stands
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The stands in the [[Akura tower]] levels are hidden by [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
